title: Nominal cooling capacity options
summary: Each unit module has nominal cooling capacities of 65kW, 80kW, and 130kW.
evidence_quote: 每个单元模块的名义制冷量不同，有 65kW，80kW 和 130kW 可选。

title: Maximum number of combined modules
summary: Up to 8 modules can be combined, providing a cooling capacity range of 65–1040kW.
evidence_quote: 通过组合 1～8 个相同或不同的单元模块，机组形成制冷量在 65～1040kW 范围的系列产品。

title: Minimum heating operation ambient temperature
summary: The unit can stably heat at ambient temperatures as low as -15°C.
evidence_quote: 使机组可以在低至-15℃温度下稳定制热。

title: LSQWRF65M/B performance parameters
summary: Cooling capacity 65kW, heating capacity 70kW, cooling power 20.3kW, heating power 20.0kW, noise 67dB(A), water flow 11.2m³/h, water pressure drop 10kPa, water connection DN65.

title: LSQWRF80M/B performance parameters
summary: Cooling capacity 80kW, heating capacity 85kW, cooling power 26kW, heating power 25.0kW, noise 68dB(A), water flow 13.7m³/h, water pressure drop 15kPa, water connection DN65.

title: LSQWRF130M/B performance parameters
summary: Cooling capacity 130kW, heating capacity 140kW, cooling power 40.5kW, heating power 40.0kW, noise 69dB(A), water flow 22.3m³/h, water pressure drop 17.5kPa, water connection DN80.

title: Nominal operating conditions
summary: Cooling: water flow 0.172 m³/(h·kW), leaving water temperature 7°C, ambient 35°C DB. Heating: leaving water temperature 45°C, ambient 7°C DB/6°C WB.
evidence_quote:

title: Operating range
summary: Cooling: leaving water 5–15°C, ΔT 2.5–8°C, ambient 18–50°C. Heating: leaving water 30–50°C, ΔT 2.5–8°C, ambient -10–24°C.
evidence_quote:
工作范围
水侧 空气侧
项目
出水温度（℃） 进出水温差（℃） 环境干球温度（℃）
制冷 5～15 2.5～8 18～50
热泵制热 30～50 2.5～8 -10～24

title: Winter heating startup requirement
summary: Before starting in low ambient or after long shutdown, power the unit for at least 8 hours without starting the pump.
evidence_quote: 在开机前应先给机组供电（此时水泵不要启动） ，且通电时间不得低于 8 小时；

title: Freeze protection during winter shutdown
summary: To prevent freezing, keep the pump running during shutdown or drain water completely; do not use salt mixtures.
evidence_quote: 为防止冻结，在机组停机时水泵也要运行。最安全的方法是将水完全从管道内放掉，也可以在水里添加乙醇和丙醇混合物来防冻。注意：绝不可使用盐类混合物，以免腐蚀机组，损坏设备。
